generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Hoist swing angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Gantrylib
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Gantrylib
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the lab-scale gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Gantrylib
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model of the crane for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Gantrylib
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architectural visualization via context and container diagrams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Gantrylib
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for data storage, containerized via Docker"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time communication between physical and virtual systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance Gantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module encapsulating C4 Containers for integrated system components"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deploying TimescaleDB, Mosquitto, and Grafana"
    DTDFVocab:enables TimescaleDB, EclipseMosquitto, Grafana
]

instance GitHub : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Version control repository for model and code management"
    DTDFVocab:enables CADModel, KinematicModel, C4Model
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimal trajectory generation and system operation optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryGeneration
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for historical data preservation and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataAnalysis
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time system state monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeVisualization
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for ensuring digital model accuracy against physical system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAccuracyValidation
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGeneration : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal path planning for crane operations"
]

instance HistoricalDataAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of historical crane data for performance trends"
]

instance RuntimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane state and operations"
]

instance ModelAccuracyValidation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous validation of digital model against physical system behavior"
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for cart movement along the crane's horizontal axis"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for hoisting motion of the crane"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at hoist end for container pickup"
]

instance LabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Laboratory research environment for the lab-scale gantry crane system"
    base:contains CartMotorController, HoistMotorController, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program connecting to crane controllers for data transmission to Logging Application"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system uses the C4 Model for architectural visualization with a context diagram (Figure 2) and container diagram. The digital twin consists of six containers, modeling the system's components for the lab-scale gantry crane."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectory measurements with simulations, calculates distance metrics, and compares the value against an acceptable threshold."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "An MQTT Broker facilitates signaling between services including the Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, and Continuous Validation Service."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a personal computer (on-premise), with the Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard containers containerized using Docker. All software runs on the host machine, and the physical crane is connected directly to this computer."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar utilizes AutomationML for digital twin modeling, with Microsoft Azure tools for pipeline implementation. Other exemplars adopt ad-hoc approaches without specific standards compliance."
]
